title: Quick replacement of the Z-axis cable carrier
summary: Replace the Z-axis cable carrier by reusing the existing mounted end pieces when both ends of the carrier are in good condition. The source-backed procedure uses lockout/tagout, optional station side panel removal for access, removal of the old carrier from the mounted end pieces, preparation of the new carrier, positioning of internal dividers against the air line, closing the cross bars, and snapping the new carrier into the existing end pieces.
when_to_use: Use this quick replacement procedure to replace the Z-axis cable carrier when both ends of the existing carrier are in good condition and can remain mounted to the tipper.
not_for: Do not use this quick replacement procedure when both ends of the carrier are not in good condition.
Do not use this procedure when replacement requires removal or replacement of the mounted end pieces.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform lockout/tagout, gain access as needed, remove the old cable carrier, prepare the new cable carrier, and install the new carrier into the existing mounted end pieces.

safety_notes: Lock out/tag out the tipper before performing the procedure.
This quick replacement applies only when both ends of the carrier are in good condition.
If side panel removal is needed, use a 3/8-in. wrench or socket and remove nine self-tapping fasteners securing the side panel.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the station side panel

access_required: Access to the station side panel if needed
system_preconditions: Tipper is locked out/tagged out before work begins.
Both ends of the existing cable carrier are in good condition and can remain mounted.

visual_references.description: Reference figure associated with station side panel removal context and access steps that mention removing nine self-tapping fasteners with a 3/8-in. wrench or socket.

steps.title: Lock out/tag out the tipper
steps.purpose: Place the equipment in a safe state before mechanical disassembly and replacement work.
steps.instruction: Lock out/tag out the tipper as referenced by the source before starting the cable carrier replacement.
steps.expected_result: The tipper is locked out/tagged out and safe for maintenance access.
steps.healthy_condition: LOTO has been applied and maintenance can proceed.
steps.failure_condition: The tipper is not locked out/tagged out or cannot be confirmed safe for maintenance.
stop_or_escalate_if: LOTO cannot be applied.
Safe maintenance state cannot be confirmed.

source_evidence.text: Lock out/tag out the tipper as referenced by the source.

steps.title: Remove the station side panel if needed
steps.purpose: Gain access needed to perform the cable carrier replacement.
steps.instruction: If needed, use a 3/8-in. wrench or socket to remove the nine self-tapping fasteners securing the side panel, then remove the station side panel.
steps.expected_result: The station side panel is removed when needed and access is available.
steps.healthy_condition: The side panel is removed without issue, or removal is not needed.
steps.failure_condition: The side panel cannot be removed, the fasteners cannot be removed, or access remains blocked.

actions.label: Remove side panel fasteners
actions.exact_action: Use a 3/8-in. wrench or socket to remove the nine self-tapping fasteners securing the side panel.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the maintenance figure as contextual support for the station side panel access area referenced by the source note.

stop_or_escalate_if: Nine self-tapping fasteners cannot be removed with the specified tool.
The side panel cannot be removed safely.
Required access is still not available after panel removal.

source_evidence.text: If needed, use a 3/8-in. wrench or socket to remove the nine self-tapping fasteners securing the side panel, then remove the station side panel to access the motor.
Nearby procedure steps instruct the technician to LOTO the tipper, remove nine self-tapping fasteners from the side panel if needed...

steps.title: Disconnect the old cable carrier from the mounted end pieces
steps.purpose: Separate the old cable carrier while preserving the mounted end pieces for reuse.
steps.instruction: Snap apart the cable carrier at both ends, leaving the end pieces attached to the tipper.
steps.expected_result: The cable carrier is disconnected from both mounted end pieces and the end pieces remain attached to the tipper.
steps.healthy_condition: Both end pieces remain mounted and intact after the carrier is snapped apart.
steps.failure_condition: An end piece is damaged, does not remain mounted, or cannot be separated as described.

actions.label: Snap apart carrier at both ends
actions.exact_action: Snap apart the cable carrier at both ends, leaving the end pieces attached to the tipper.

stop_or_escalate_if: Either end piece is not in good condition.
An end piece does not remain attached to the tipper.
The carrier cannot be snapped apart without damaging the mounted end pieces.

source_evidence.text: Snap apart the cable carrier at both ends, leaving the end pieces attached to the tipper.
Replace the Z-axis cable carrier by reusing the existing mounted end pieces when both ends of the carrier are in good condition.

steps.title: Prepare the new cable carrier ends and open its cross bars
steps.purpose: Prepare the replacement cable carrier for transfer of routing and installation.
steps.instruction: Snap the ends off the new cable carrier and open all cross bars on the outside of the new cable carrier.
steps.expected_result: The new cable carrier ends are removed and all outside cross bars are open.
steps.healthy_condition: The new cable carrier is open and ready for positioning and internal arrangement.
steps.failure_condition: The new cable carrier ends cannot be removed or the cross bars cannot be opened.

actions.label: Remove new carrier ends
actions.exact_action: Snap the ends off the new cable carrier.

actions.label: Open new carrier cross bars
actions.exact_action: Open all cross bars on the outside of the new cable carrier.

stop_or_escalate_if: The new cable carrier cannot be prepared as described.
Cross bars are damaged or do not open.

source_evidence.text: Snap the ends off the new cable carrier and open all cross bars on the outside of the new cable carrier.

steps.title: Open the old cable carrier and remove it
steps.purpose: Free and remove the old cable carrier from the system.
steps.instruction: Open all cross bars on the outside of the old cable carrier and remove the old cable carrier from the system.
steps.expected_result: The old cable carrier is removed from the system.
steps.healthy_condition: The old cable carrier is fully removed without affecting the mounted end pieces intended for reuse.
steps.failure_condition: The old cable carrier cannot be removed or removal damages retained components.

actions.label: Open old carrier cross bars
actions.exact_action: Open all cross bars on the outside of the old cable carrier.

actions.label: Remove old carrier
actions.exact_action: Remove the old cable carrier from the system.

stop_or_escalate_if: The old cable carrier cannot be removed cleanly.
Removal affects the mounted end pieces or surrounding components.

source_evidence.text: Open all cross bars on the outside of the old cable carrier and remove the old cable carrier from the system.

steps.title: Position the new cable carrier and set the internal dividers
steps.purpose: Place the replacement carrier and arrange the internal dividers as specified before closure.
steps.instruction: Place the new cable carrier roughly in position and move the internal dividers all the way to one side, against the air line.
steps.expected_result: The new cable carrier is positioned and the internal dividers are moved fully to one side against the air line.
steps.healthy_condition: The new carrier is in position and the internal dividers are fully against the air line.
steps.failure_condition: The carrier cannot be positioned correctly or the internal dividers cannot be moved as specified.

actions.label: Position new carrier
actions.exact_action: Place the new cable carrier roughly in position.

actions.label: Set internal dividers
actions.exact_action: Move the internal dividers all the way to one side, against the air line.

stop_or_escalate_if: Internal dividers cannot be moved all the way to one side.
The dividers cannot be positioned against the air line.
The new carrier cannot be placed in position.

source_evidence.text: Place the new cable carrier roughly in position and move the internal dividers all the way to one side, against the air line.
The internal dividers are positioned against the air line...

steps.title: Close all cross bars on the new cable carrier
steps.purpose: Secure the new cable carrier after internal arrangement.
steps.expected_result: All cross bars on the new cable carrier are closed.
steps.healthy_condition: All cross bars are fully snapped closed.
steps.failure_condition: One or more cross bars do not close or do not remain closed.
stop_or_escalate_if: Any cross bar cannot be snapped closed.
Any cross bar does not remain closed.

steps.title: Snap the new cable carrier into the mounted end pieces
steps.purpose: Complete installation of the replacement cable carrier using the existing mounted end pieces.
steps.instruction: Snap both ends of the new cable carrier into the end pieces that remain mounted.
steps.expected_result: Both ends of the new cable carrier are snapped into the existing mounted end pieces.
steps.healthy_condition: The new cable carrier is installed in place of the old carrier with both ends snapped into the mounted end pieces.
steps.failure_condition: Either end does not snap into place, does not remain seated, or the mounted end pieces cannot accept the new carrier.

actions.label: Install new carrier into mounted end pieces
actions.exact_action: Snap both ends of the new cable carrier into the end pieces that remain mounted.

stop_or_escalate_if: Either end of the new cable carrier does not snap into the mounted end piece.
Mounted end pieces are damaged or do not retain the new carrier.
Final installed condition does not match the expected result.

source_evidence.text: Snap both ends of the new cable carrier into the end pieces that remain mounted.
The new cable carrier is installed in place of the old carrier... and both ends are snapped into the existing mounted end pieces.

success_criteria: The new cable carrier is installed in place of the old carrier.
The internal dividers are positioned against the air line.
Both ends of the new cable carrier are snapped into the existing mounted end pieces.
healthy_conditions: Tipper is locked out/tagged out before maintenance begins.
Mounted end pieces remain attached and usable.
The new cable carrier is positioned correctly.
Internal dividers are moved all the way to one side against the air line.
All cross bars are snapped closed.
Both ends of the new cable carrier are fully snapped into the mounted end pieces.
failure_conditions: Both ends of the existing carrier are not in good condition.
LOTO cannot be applied or confirmed.
The station side panel cannot be removed when needed.
Mounted end pieces are damaged, removed, or cannot be reused.
Internal dividers cannot be positioned against the air line.
Cross bars cannot be opened or closed as required.
The new cable carrier cannot be snapped into the existing mounted end pieces.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if both ends of the existing carrier are not in good condition, because the source states the quick replacement applies only in that condition.
Escalate if LOTO cannot be completed or safe maintenance state cannot be confirmed.
Escalate if the mounted end pieces are damaged or cannot remain attached for reuse.
Escalate if the new cable carrier cannot be installed with both ends snapped into the existing mounted end pieces.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Contextual visual support for station side panel access and removal note referenced in the candidate.
